mapper.select:
SELECT t.id, t.name, t.server_id AS serverId, t.server_name AS serverName, t.type, t.priority, t.cpu_core_need AS cpuCoreNeed, t.memory_need AS memoryNeed, t.progress, t.status, t.start_time AS startTime FROM task t
AND ( t.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND ( t.status = #{status} )
AND ( t.server_id = #{serverId} )
ORDER BY t.start_time DESC
